problem: Poor SEO, slow initial load, high client resource usage
correct_pattern: Use SSG/SSR/ISR for SEO pages, CSR for private pages
detection_method: Lighthouse SEO score, no meta tags in HTML

problem: Wasted server resources, slower than SSG
correct_pattern: Use SSG for static content, ISR for periodic updates

problem: Stale data, poor UX for live updates
correct_pattern: Use CSR with WebSocket or SSR with streaming

anti_pattern: No ISR for frequently updated content
correct_pattern: Use ISR with appropriate revalidation time
Use Zustand for UI state, TanStack Query for server

problem: No caching, duplicate requests, race conditions
correct_pattern: Use TanStack Query or SWR for server state

anti_pattern: No cache strategy for API calls
problem: Duplicate requests, slow UX, wasted bandwidth
correct_pattern: Implement TanStack Query with proper caching

problem: Hard to test, hard to reuse, tight coupling
correct_pattern: Move to hooks, services, or domain layer
Use context or state management library
Use httpOnly cookies, secure token storage
Implement route-based code splitting
Use next/image or lazy loading attribute
Use web workers, break up long tasks
Use react-window or virtualization library
Use WebP/AVIF, proper sizing, CDN

problem: Flash of unstyled text, slow LCP
correct_pattern: Use font-display: swap, preload, subset
Regular bundle analysis, tree shaking

problem: Slow global load times, server load
correct_pattern: Use Cloudflare, Vercel, or AWS CloudFront

anti_pattern: No cache headers on API responses
correct_pattern: Set appropriate Cache-Control headers
Implement cache tags, webhooks, or TTL
Implement service worker with workbox
Implement Sentry or similar
Implement RUM, Lighthouse CI
Set up alerts for error rate, performance

problem: Hard to scale, slow builds, tight coupling
correct_pattern: Consider micro-frontends or modular architecture

problem: Hard to maintain, test, and reason about
correct_pattern: Apply Clean Architecture, separate layers

problem: Hard to find related code, coupling
correct_pattern: Use feature-based folder structure
Implement typed API client with TypeScript
Document and plan hybrid architecture strategy
Implement error boundaries, fallback pages
